prompt: Tech startup app icon logo design. A rounded square container (like an iOS app icon) with a dark background that has a subtle gradient from dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) to pure black (#0A0A0A). Inside the rounded square, the letters 'MM' are displayed in bold white (#FFFFFF) geometric sans-serif type, perfectly centered, with slight letter-spacing. The rounded square has a very subtle 1px border of dark gray (#2A2A2A). Below the app icon, the word 'AGENCY' appears in very small uppercase text with extremely wide letter-spacing (tracking), in a muted gray color (#666666). A small cyan (#00E3FF) dot appears after the word AGENCY as the brand accent. The overall aesthetic is clean, minimal, Silicon Valley tech company — like the Stripe, Linear, or Vercel brand identity. Professional studio mockup on pure black background. Vector-quality, 8K graphic design, brand identity.
